Türkçe

KHAS Family Visited Dolmabahçe Palace

One of the most meaningful events organized by Kadir Has University within the scope of the 100th anniversary of the foundation of our Republic took place today.

Accompanied by our Rector Prof. Dr. Sondan Durukanoğlu Feyiz, a large team consisting of academicians, employees, students and graduates of the KHAS Family met at Dolmabahçe Palace, where Mustafa Kemal stayed during her visits to Istanbul and spent her last days.

The KHAS Family met in Kabataş, paid their respects to Atatürk, then toured the palace and visited the room where Atatürk passed away.
